rationale.R1.7: The delegation 'check the citations' maps exclusively and load-bearingly onto R1.7. The artifact contains one named in-text citation (Eyring et al., 2016 for CMIP6 projections), several uncited quantitative claims (the 20–40% adaptation gap, 31% higher uptake, 240-household calibration to ACS data), and a vague attribution ('recent generative-agent work for interactive simulacra') with no reference. Verifying existence, accuracy, completeness, and attribution of all these is the entire substance of the task; failure here fully invalidates the delegation.
